name: Fireworks AI
description: Registers Fireworks AI as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Fireworks API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Fireworks API key
settings.description: Fireworks API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to FIREWORKS_API_KEY.

providers.name: Fireworks AI
providers.description: Refreshes Fireworks chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
